Our Collaborations

MENU

SUSTAINABLE SME FOREIGN TRADE MANAGEMENT PROGRAM

(Organized in collaboration with KOSGEB Istanbul Anatolian Side Directorate – IMES Dilovası OIZ – Istanbul Okan University)

As part of the Enterprise Europe Network Project, the KOSGEB Istanbul Anatolian Side Directorate, in collaboration with Istanbul Okan University’s Department of International Trade, will organize a free-of-charge SME Foreign Trade Management Program between

January 28, 2019 – March 29, 2019

, targeting companies operating in the IMES Industrial Zone.

The aim of this program is to strengthen the export infrastructure of participating companies and to ensure the sustainability of their export activities by planning future exports through

market research, customer database creation, target country selection

, and similar strategies.

Within the scope of the program, faculty members from Istanbul Okan University’s Department of International Trade will provide training to participant companies on the following topics:

Business Management Systems of Foreign Trade Companies (in line with ICC principles)

Market Communication / Target Market Selection Methods

Common Misconceptions in Foreign Trade

Interpretation of Macroeconomic Indicators

Horizon Tour of Target Market Economies (Russia, China, India, Mexico, EU countries)

Following the training sessions, the same faculty members will also provide

consultancy/mentoring services

to the companies. Additionally, students from Istanbul Okan University’s Department of International Trade will support the effective implementation of the program by participating as

interns in the companies

.

At the end of the program, the following export-oriented targets are set for the participating companies:

Identification of 10 target countries

Creation of a customer database with 200 entries

Selection of 50 potential clients to work with

A minimum of

$100,000 USD in exports

Participation in at least 2 trade fairs (domestic and international)

Participation in at least 2 buyer and seller delegation events

In this context, the companies are expected to participate in the following:

Domestic Fair

: WIN Eurasia Fair to be held at TÜYAP Fair and Congress Center between

International Fair

: Hannover Messe 2019 - Industry and Industrial Fair to be held in

Hannover, Germany, between April 1–5, 2019

These fairs will include

international cooperation and matchmaking events

with other participating companies.

(For the international fair in Germany,

60% of transportation and accommodation expenses

per company (up to

3,000 TL

) will be supported under

KOSGEB’s Business Development Support Program – International Business Trip Support

.)

For more detailed information about the program:
